The problem with writing JavaScript based software (or programming languages) like Ruby / Python without annotations from JS developers isn't because coding quality doesn´re bad but rather as having too many references thrown into small chunks while not adding enough complexity . This means when developing certain functionality then errors will occur which might cause problems since very few people take advantage entirely ;) But now just remember don\'T forget even some C/CLR libraries require classes yet !!
